policy: Any tape observed by a human, agent or development script is permanently ineligible for virgin confirmation. Ambiguous concurrent ranges are conservatively reserved.

blocks.label: bottleneck_calibration
blocks.reason: M/T/R policy selection and corrective audits

blocks.label: bottleneck_locked
blocks.reason: M/T/R locked evaluation and corrective audits

blocks.label: bottleneck_learner_reserved
blocks.reason: Learner block remains prohibited while the pre-learner gate is closed

blocks.label: concurrent_stylized_voi_atlas
blocks.reason: Corrective replay reconstructs seed_start=7200001+1000*cell_index with 48 tapes for each of 64 cells and reproduces all stored values. Because the commit supplies no runner or manifest, the wider 7.2M block remains excluded fail-closed.

blocks.label: factory_app_cd_v1_unauthorized_execution
blocks.reason: An untracked Stage-A JSON discovered at 2026-07-13T21:27:28Z reports 400 tapes from seed 9600001. The execution preceded the written audit that rejected its source, observability, comparator and resource contract. The output has no valid custody chain and supplies no scientific result, but every consumed seed is permanently burned. See factory_app_cd_gate_v1_rejection.json v2 and the forensic record.

blocks.label: factory_app_cd_v1_declared_remainder
blocks.reason: The rejected runner's open-ended declaration is withdrawn. A future valid APP/CD protocol must allocate a new disjoint seed block; it may not infer virgin status from this old declaration.

concurrent_ledger_defect.reconstructed_pattern: cell_index 0..63 uses 7200001+1000*cell_index through +47; validated by exact reproduction of all 64 stored H_PI/H_obs values
concurrent_ledger_defect.resolution: the conservative 7200001-7299999 reservation in this correction governs
